snippet.title: Perseverance RoverŌĆÖs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASAŌĆÖs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ŌĆō the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ŌĆō search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAŌĆÖs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Lu├Łsa Sonza, Thiaguinho - Cansar Voc├¬
snippet.description:
Cansar Voc├¬ 
(Douglas Moda, Luisa Sonza, Thiaguinho, Vitao)

Amor

Ser├Ī que tu pa
De hoje vir me ver
Amanh├Ż n├Żo d├Ī 
Que Eu vou pro rol├¬ 
 Se tu n├Żo aguentar 
Pode me dizer 
Que eu vou me cansar em cima de voc├¬ 
Que eu vou me cansar e vou cansar voc├¬ 

To me segurando pra ningu├®m saber 
To querendo muito e n├Żo quero dizer 
Isso tudo que talvez seja gosta de voc├¬ 
 
Mas sei l├Ī vai saber 

Que eu sou braba 
S├│ de pensar que eu at├® fui com a tua cara 
Quando tu pega de jeito e n├Żo para
Correndo o risco de t├Ī viciada 

Abismada 

To encantada 

Foi muito mais que devia e tua cara 
Quando me olha me deixa excitada 
Tarada, toda molhada 

 Amor

Ser├Ī que tu pa
De hoje vir me ver
Amanh├Ż n├Żo d├Ī 
Que Eu vou pro rol├¬ 
 Se tu n├Żo aguentar 
Pode me dizer 
Que eu vou me cansar em cima de voc├¬ 
Que eu vou me cansar e vou cansar voc├¬

quem sabe amanh├Ż de noite 
a gente lembra de 
mandar mensagem pra falar besteira

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASAŌĆÖs Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32ŌĆÖ to tie at one and added two more in the 65ŌĆÖ and 85ŌĆÖ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70ŌĆÖ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27ŌĆÖ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: NASAŌĆÖS Perseverance RoverŌĆÖs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASAŌĆÖs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the roverŌĆÖs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or ŌĆ£headŌĆØ) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on MarsŌĆÖ Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for PerseveranceŌĆÖs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planetŌĆÖs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Demi Lovato: Dancing with the Devil | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Featuring the exclusive first listen to Demi LovatoŌĆÖs title song to the powerful four-part documentary event, ŌĆ£Dancing With the Devil.ŌĆØ

Premiering March 23, Demi Lovato holds nothing back in this powerful four part documentary series exploring every aspect that led to her nearly fatal overdose in 2018, and her awakenings in the aftermath. Director Michael D. Ratner is granted unprecedented access to the superstarŌĆÖs personal and musical journey during the most trying time of her life as she unearths her prior traumas and discovers the importance of her physical, emotional, and mental health. Far deeper than an inside look beyond the celebrity surface, this is an intimate portrait of addiction, and the process of healing and empowerment.

fr.title: Demi Lovato : Danse avec le diable | Bande-annonce officielle
fr.description:
Voici en exclusivit├® la chanson de Demi Lovato qui a donn├® son titre au puissant documentaire " Danse avec le diable ".

Demi Lovato se d├®voile toute enti├©re dans cette puissante s├®rie documentaire en quatre parties qui explore tous les aspects qui ont conduit ├Ā son overdose presque fatale en 2018, et ├Ā ses r├®v├®lations par la suite. Le r├®alisateur Michael D. Ratner a un acc├©s sans pr├®c├®dent au parcours personnel et musical de la superstar pendant la p├®riode la plus ├®prouvante de sa vie, tandis qu'elle revient sur ses traumatismes ant├®rieurs et d├®couvre l'importance de sa sant├® physique, ├®motionnelle et mentale. Bien plus qu'un regard int├®rieur au-del├Ā de la surface de la c├®l├®brit├®, il s'agit d'un portrait intime autour de la d├®pendance, du processus de gu├®rison et de prise de pouvoir".

es-419.title: Demi Lovato: Bailando con el Diablo |  Tr├Īiler oficial
es-419.description: Presentamos pro primera vez la canci├│n de Demi Lovato que da nombre al poderoso documental: "Bailando con el Diablo".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Demi Lovato no se guarda nada en esta serie documental dividida en cuatro partes, que abarca todos los pormenores que desembocaron en la casi fatal sobredosis en 2018 y su reflexi├│n sobre las secuelas. El director Michael D. Ratner tuvo un acceso sin precedente a la vida y carrera musical de la artista durante la etapa m├Īs dif├Łcil de su vida mientras remembra sus traumas del pasado y descubre la importancia de la salud mental, emocional y f├Łsica. M├Īs all├Ī de ser una indagaci├│n en la vida de la celebridad, es un retrato ├Łntimo de la adicci├│n y del proceso de recuperaci├│n y fortalecimiento.

pt-BR.title: Demi Lovato: Dan├¦ando com o Diabo | Trailer Oficial
pt-BR.description:
Apresentando, com exclusividade, a m├║sica de Demi Lovato que deu nome ao impactante document├Īrio "Dan├¦ando com o Diabo".

Demi Lovato n├Żo esconde nada nesse impactante document├Īrio em quatro partes, que explora os aspectos que levaram ├Ā overdose que quase lhe tirou a vida em 2018, e o despertar que veio a seguir. O diretor Michael D. Ratner obteve um acesso sem precedentes ├Ā jornada pessoal e musical da estrela durante o per├Łodo mais dif├Łcil de sua vida, na medida em que ela revela traumas antigos e descobre a import├óncia de sua sa├║de f├Łsica, emocional e mental. Muito mais do que uma an├Īlise que ultrapassa a superf├Łcie de celebridade, ├® um retrato ├Łntimo do v├Łcio, e do processo de cura e empoderamento.

de.title: Demi Lovato: Tanz mit dem Teufel | Official Trailer
de.description:
Inklusive der Premiere von Demi Lovatos Titelsong zur kraftvollen Dokumentation ŌĆ×Tanz mit dem TeufelŌĆ£.

Demi Lovato h├żlt nichts zur├╝ck in dieser kraftvollen, vierteiligen Dokuserie, die die Hintergr├╝nde beleuchtet, die zu ihrer fast t├Čdlichen ├£berdosis im Jahr 2018 f├╝hrten, und ihr neues Leben in der Zeit danach. Regisseur Michael D. Ratner erh├żlt einen einzigartigen Zugang zu der pers├Čnlichen und musikalischen Reise des Superstars w├żhrend der schwierigsten Zeit ihres Lebens. Sie setzt sich mit alten Traumata auseinander und entdeckt die Bedeutung ihrer k├Črperlichen, emotionalen und geistigen Gesundheit. Die Serie ist weit mehr als ein Blick hinter die Promi-Oberfl├żche, sie ist ein intimes Portr├żt ├╝ber Sucht und den Prozess der Heilung und des Wiedererstarkens.

id.title: Demi Lovato: Bermain-main dengan Bahaya | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Pemutaran perdana lagu Demi Lovato untuk dokumenter epik, "Bermain-main dengan Bahaya".

Demi Lovato bicara blak-blakan dalam serial dokumenter epik empat bagian ini yang menggali semua aspek penyebab dia nyaris mengalami overdosis mematikan pada tahun 2018, dan kebangkitan dia setelahnya. Sutradara Michael D. Ratner mendapat akses khusus ke perjalanan pribadi dan musikal megabintang itu selama masa tersulit hidupnya saat dia mengungkap trauma masa lalu dan menyadari pentingnya kesehatan fisik, emosi, dan mental. Di balik kehidupan selebritas yang glamor, terdapat potret kecanduan yang parah, dan proses penyembuhan, serta pencerahan.

Letra

Perdona si te estoy llamado en este momento
Pero quer├Ła decirte todo lo que siento
Yo se que las palabras se las lleva el viento
Pero sino te llamo voy a enloquecer

Y se muy bien que estoy violando nuestro juramento
Despu├®s de par de tragos siempre me arrepiento
Yo se que estas con alguien que no es el momento
Y tienes que saber

Que estoy muriendo, muriendo por verte
Agonizando sino puedo volver a verte, recuerdoŌĆ”

Tu cuerpo y el m├Ło, llenando el vac├Ło 
Y por la noche baby siento frio si tu no estas conmigo
Recuerdo esa noche, Yo sigo vac├Ło
Como se llena baby este vac├Ło si tu no estas conmigo, 
Conmigo, conmigo, Yo sigo vac├Ło
Como se llena baby este vac├Ło si tu no estas conmigo

Se que estas intentando olvidarme y no esta pasando
Cada beso que el te esta dando,
Solos los m├Łos esta sintiendo porque estas recordando

ToŌĆÖ esas noches buenas, nuestra canci├│n suena
Tu ropa en el piso, Grabamos una escena

Nadie como yo lo hizo bajo la luna llena

To esas noches buenas, nuestra canci├│n suena
Est├Ībamos en el piso, Fuimos a las estrellas
Ya yo he dao mil besos, Y ninguna es tan bella
Y ahora te confieso que, aunque estoy con ella

Me estoy muriendo, muriendo por verte
Agonizando si no puedo volver a verte

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.description:

Letra:
Meu ponto de equil├Łbrio ├® voc├¬, voc├¬
Surtada, tempestade em copo dŌĆÖagua
Fica bravinha por nada, mais ainda ├® voc├¬, voc├¬
Surtada, tempestade em copo dŌĆÖagua 
E mesmo estando errada n├Żo da o bra├¦o a torcer 
De que adianta eu ser dur├Żo e o cora├¦├Żo ser vulner├Īvel 
As palavras s├Żo capazes de abalar o inabal├Īvel 
S├│ quando eu brigo com ela e me sinto fraco 
N├Żo existe um grande homem sem uma mulher do lado 
To ligado que n├Żo tem que ser assim 
E que eu deveria gostar muito mais de mim 
 mas nunca conheci uma mulher que nem ela 
E mesmo se existia eu quero s├│ ela 
Eu sei que toda mulher carrega em si , uma for├¦a que s├│ ela ├® capaz de ter 
E as vezes me pergunto o que ela viu em mim
Eu que sempre vi nela e n├Żo sei descrever 
N├Żo somente sua apar├¬ncia mas a sua intelig├¬ncia 
E o jeito que ela senta ├® de impressionar 
 Mina pra frente independente, treinada e chapa quente 
Pra cima do progresso sabe seu lugar 
Eu e ela ├® casal breck de 4
Mas sa├Łmos do b.o e estamos recuperados 
M├│ engra├¦ado essa bandida ├® m├│ brisa 
Quando passa se calcinha ela me hipnotiza 
Vontade de largar tudo e construir fam├Łlia, de sai do aluguel e muda pra Bras├Łlia 
Papo de sai no jet e fuma uns beck de beber uma black e ter um moleque 
Se der n├│is faz hoje mesmo, que eu to sem tempo
E to vivendo, querendo ver voc├¬ a todo momento 
E ├® isso mesmo relacionamento, e toda vez q a gente briga eu juro que aprendo 
Sabe por que?
Meu ponto de equil├Łbrio ├® voc├¬, voc├¬
Surtada, tempestade em copo dŌĆÖagua
Fica bravinha por nada, mais ainda ├® voc├¬, voc├¬, voc├¬ 
E mesmo estando errada n├Żo da o bra├¦o a torcer 
Agora ├® a minha vez de fala da minha surtada 
Fazer o que se eu amo assim bate o ├® e faz biquinho
Fala que vai embora, ai de mim se eu disser tchau 
Fogo no estopim e aumenta o montin ap├│s algumas horas ela cansa eu dou pau 
E vai de lado de frente de 4 como tu quiser 
Adora quando se empodera e sabe que ├® mulher 
Ela ├® bandida eu sou vil├Żo, n├│is dois juntos contra o mund├Żo 
Inimigos da perfei├¦├Żo e parente da emo├¦├Żo 
E baby eu conto as horas pra te ver chegar e sempre quando chega adoro ver voc├¬  sentando 
N├│is fica na brisa fode e fuma um ch├Ī pela nossa historia n├│is sempre vai viajar
E planejando ser├Ī que n├│is mora junto esse ano ? 
Ser├Ī  Maria Eduarda ou Matheus Fernando? 
E eu to olhando nossos pivete e eu gargalhando 
Me desculpa se um dia eu te fiz sofrer 
Gata me desculpa se um dia eu te fiz chorar 
Hoje em dia eu conto as horas pra poder te ver 
O maloqueiro aqui reza pelos nossos momentos para n├Żo acabar

snippet.title: I'm Leaving YouTube
snippet.description:
­¤ōØ Follow MattŌĆÖs Newsletter: http://yestheory.com/newsletter/

After five and a half years as a host on this channel, I've decided to step away. 'Thank You' are the only two words I can muster. You, this community, have shown me nothing but endless love and support. The video goes into detail about my decision.

I'll be writing a short newsletter twice a month at www.yestheory.com/newsletter. This is the newsletter I wish my 19 year old self had when I first set out to live a fulfilling life. When you sign you'll receive lessons, tips and tricks from ten years of seeking discomfort.

I'll also be working on the book which will come out in November of this year...but more on that later.

Come follow along on the ride. We're only just getting started :)

Also, make sure to wait till the end to watch our EPIC season trailer. 

Love you all,

Matt

­¤Ä¼  MattŌĆÖs Best Moments: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3yw6EPr6jJM

­¤ōĖ Instagram -  https://www.instagram.com/yestheory/

If you want to join the Yes Fam Facebook group which is 100,000+ of our most engaged and badass community members, you can apply here: 
https://www.facebook.com/groups/yesfam/

­¤Äź HOW WE MAKE OUR VIDEOS

­¤ÄĄ Where we find our music:
1- Epidemic Sound. Amazing royalty free music for YouTube. Free 30 day trial here: http://share.epidemicsound.com/wFFbrŌĆŗ 

2- Musicbed. Amazing label-quality cinematic music. 30-day free trial here:
http://share.mscbd.fm/YesTheoryŌĆŗ

3- Artlist. 2 Months Free High Quality Music: https://artlist.io/artlist-70446/?artŌĆŗ...

­¤Ä× Our b-roll and stock footage:

2 Months Free Stock Footage Videos: https://artgrid.io/Artgrid-114820?artŌĆŗ...

For an amazing b-roll and footage library, checkout: http://storyblocks.com/YesTheoryŌĆŗ

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanŌĆÖs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: 6 MIN EVERYDAY STRETCH - for stiff muscles, flexibility & after your workout I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
a quick routine for every day ŌÖź’ĖÄ it works perfectly as a cool down after ANY kind of workout! But of course, you can also do this in an office break, simply to relax, before bed or in the morning / Werbung 

We stretch our entire body! 6min = 12 exercises. Short but beneficial :)
- legs, hips & butt
- tummy 
- back & chest 
- spine 

I learned to love stretching sooooo much! I remember, about 6 months ago I definitely didn't stretch enough. This also impacted by training, since my muscles were feeling stiff and sore for longer, I started getting pain in my knees, etc. 
Now, I really look forward to a short stretch after a session. It's so relaxing, the music calms me down and you will quickly see improvements :)

Let's calm down & give our bodies some love in a different kind of way. 

__

Ō¢Ė you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

Ō×× Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

Ō¢Ė my Pam App ŌÖź’ĖÄ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__

Ō¢Ė You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ŌÖź’ĖÄ
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Charlotte Cardin ŌĆō Daddy 0:00 - 2:46
2. Faouzia & John Legend - Minefields 2:47 - 5:43
3. Birdy - Loneliness 5:44 - 7:43

pamela_reif@icloud.com

By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award┬« winner Emma Stone (ŌĆ£La La LandŌĆØ) stars in DisneyŌĆÖs ŌĆ£Cruella,ŌĆØ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious ŌĆō and notoriously fashionable ŌĆō villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. ŌĆ£Cruella,ŌĆØ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, EstellaŌĆÖs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar┬« winner Emma Thompson (ŌĆ£Howards End,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£Sense & SensibilityŌĆØ). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
┬Ā
DisneyŌĆÖs ŌĆ£CruellaŌĆØ is directed by Craig Gillespie (ŌĆ£I TonyaŌĆØ) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (ŌĆ£Freaky FridayŌĆØ), Marc Platt (ŌĆ£Mary Poppins ReturnsŌĆØ) and Kristin Burr (ŌĆ£Christopher RobinŌĆØ), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar┬«- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (ŌĆ£Mad Max: Fury Road,ŌĆØ ŌĆ£A Room with a ViewŌĆØ) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on ŌĆ£Cruella,ŌĆØ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:┬Āhttps://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:┬Āhttps://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersŌĆŗ
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: UFC 259 Free Fight: Israel Adesanya vs Paulo Costa
snippet.description:
A stacked UFC 259 featuring three title fights is right around the corner on Saturday, March 6. Middleweight champion Israel Adesanya will move up a weight class to take on light heavyweight champion Jan Blachowicz in the main event. Watch Adesanya's last title defense against Paulo Costa at UFC 253 last year on Fight Island to get ready for UFC 259.

Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

snippet.title: AWWW! Mary Jo Sings In Front Of Her Mom For The FIRST Time Ever! - American Idol 2021
snippet.description:
Mary Jo has come a long way since her 4th grade talent show yodeling days. Not only was this American Idol audition the first time Mary Jo has ŌĆ£genuinely performed for anyoneŌĆØ since 4th grade, but it was the first time she performed in front of her own mother! Thanks to Katy Perry, Lionel Richie and Luke Bryan, Mary Jo and her mother are able to share a very special, magical moment in the audition room. Watch here to see why Luke predicts Mary Jo is ŌĆ£top 10ŌĆØ material for American Idol!



See more of American Idol 2021 on our official site: http://www.americanidol.com
Like American Idol on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AmericanIdol
Follow American Idol on Twitter: https://twitter.com/americanidol

AMERICAN IDOL, the iconic series that revolutionized the television landscape by pioneering the music competition genre, returns on ABC.

American Idol 2021

Helping to determine who America will ultimately vote for to become the next singing sensation are music industry forces and superstar judges Luke Bryan, Katy Perry and Lionel Richie. Emmy┬« Award-winning host and producer Ryan Seacrest continues as host of the beloved series, while multimedia personality Bobby Bones serves as the in-house mentor.

snippet.title: Por que Londres est├Ī perdendo popula├¦├Żo num ├¬xodo sem precedentes
snippet.description:
O Reino Unido sofreu no ano passado a maior queda populacional desde a Segunda Guerra Mundial. Um decl├Łnio impulsionado por um ├¬xodo em massa de migrantes, com epicentro em Londres.

Cerca de 1,3 milh├Żo de estrangeiros deixaram o pa├Łs entre o terceiro trimestre de 2019 e o mesmo per├Łodo de 2020, segundo dados do Centro de Excel├¬ncia de Estat├Łsticas Econ├┤micas (ESCOE, na sigla em ingl├¬s).

Uma fuga que se manifesta com for├¦a na capital inglesa: 700 mil estrangeiros deixaram a cidade, segundo estimativas feitas pelos economistas Jonathan Portes e Michael O'Connor, que cruzaram dados oficiais sobre emprego e popula├¦├Żo.

Neste v├Łdeo, Rodrigo Pinto explica como a pandemia e o Brexit est├Żo por tr├Īs desta queda e fala sobre o que pode dificultar uma revers├Żo nesse quadro.

Leia tamb├®m a reportagem: https://www.bbc.com/portuguese/internacional-55885521

Curtiu? Inscreva-se no canal da BBC News Brasil! E se quiser ler mais not├Łcias, clique aqui:  www.bbc.co.uk/portuguese

snippet.title: O PEDIDO DE CASAMENTO DOS MEUS SONHOS
snippet.description:
Meu Deus! Ele fez o pedido de casamento dos meus sonhos!
Mikael organizou tudo de surpresa durante uma viagem nossa pra um ilha paradis├Łaca em Angra dos Reis, chamada Ilha da Gip├│ia. 

"Voc├¬ quer casar comigo"? Essas 3 palavrinhas m├Īgicas sa├Łram da boca dele quando chegamos a um cen├Īrio rom├óntico na praia que parecia coisa de filme! 

Em segredo, Mikael comprou a alian├¦a e preparou tudo. Eles entraram em contato com a pousada Vitorino, com o restaurante Canto das Canoas, com a cerimonialista Luciane Brasil e com a Doce Angra Turismo e juntos eles proporcionaram um dia perfeito, com Mikael pedindo a minha m├Żo em casamento e fechando com chave de ouro! 

E ├® claro que EU DISSE SIM! Estamos oficialmente noivos!
E agora eu j├Ī to pensando no casamento ahaha

Eu t├┤ t├Żo maravilhada que s├│ posso agradecer muito o trabalho incr├Łvel de todos os envolvidos nesse sonho real:

Pousada Vitorino - @pousadavitorinogipoia
Restaurante Canto das Canoas - @cantodascanoas
Cerimonialista - @cerimoniallucianebrasil / @decoraangra / @casarcostaverde
Passeio de lancha - @doceangra

#PedidoDeCasamento #QuerCasarComigo #Noivado

Pra maratonar o canal na ordem certa:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=guspCC13H_I&list=PLyQjZpnF8fpsUyWmUD02mi-t_oSz7aitC

13 milh├Ąes de pessoas viram nosso parto aqui: 
https://youtu.be/DQXyibx7p94

Tour pela nossa casa:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tmNJQM9dVVM&t=484s

snippet.title: 'IŌĆÖm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: 5 Pessoas Que Queriam Ser Super-Her├│is e Falharam
snippet.description:
DIARIO PRIVADO Ō¢║ https://goo.su/1Qt4

Para quest├Ąes relacionadas a direitos autorais, entre em contato conosco: copymanager.mn@gmail.com

├ē bastante prov├Īvel que n├Żo exista uma ├║nica pessoa que n├Żo tenha sonhado em estar no corpo de algum super-her├│i por pelo menos um dia. Voar com o traje do Homem de Ferro, levantar o martelo de Thor ou apenas relaxar por um dia na propriedade do Batman. Imagine quantas boas a├¦├Ąes voc├¬ poderia fazer durante este tempo! Por├®m, ├® poss├Łvel mudar o mundo para melhor sem superpoderes, embora seja necess├Īrio assumir muitas responsabilidades e trabalhar muito para isso. As pessoas da nossa sele├¦├Żo de hoje decidiram transformar os quadrinhos em realidade, mas em algum momento algo deu errado. Vamos tentar descobrir se ├® poss├Łvel se tornar um her├│i mundialmente famoso sem ter habilidades sobre-humanas.

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Plen├Īrio ŌĆō Com 364 votos a favor C├ómara mant├®m pris├Żo de Daniel Silveira ŌĆō 19/02/21
snippet.description:
A C├ómara dos Deputados realiza sess├Żo deliberativa do Plen├Īrio para apreciar a medida cautelar do Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF) contra o deputado Daniel Silveira (PSL-RJ), que est├Ī preso desde ter├¦a-feira (16). A sess├Żo foi marcada em reuni├Żo de l├Łderes realizada nesta quinta-feira, na resid├¬ncia oficial do presidente da C├ómara, Arthur Lira (PP-AL).

A Constitui├¦├Żo estabelece que deputados e senadores s├Żo inviol├Īveis, civil e penalmente, por opini├Ąes, palavras e votos e n├Żo poder├Żo ser presos, salvo em flagrante de crime inafian├¦├Īvel. Nesse caso, os autos ser├Żo remetidos ├Ā Casa respectiva, para que a maioria absoluta decida, em voto aberto, sobre a pris├Żo.

Saiba como ser├Ī a sess├Żo
